mapper.select: SELECT * FROM system_config WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY config_key
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO system_config (tenant_id, config_key, config_value, config_type, remark) VALUES
(#{config.tenantId}, #{config.configKey}, #{config.configValue}, #{config.configType}, #{config.remark})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = VALUES(config_value), config_type = VALUES(config_type), remark = VALUES(remark)
